name: Sacred Burst Crystal
description: This silver-white weapon is decorated with dozens of golden sun motifs. Runic phrases describing various heroic deeds run along its blade or haft and glow when it is wielded. A sacred burst weapon functions as a sacred weapon. In addition, the weapon explodes with positive energy on a successful critical hit, dealing extra positive energy damage to creatures. Critical ×2: 1d10 (+2d10 evil outsider). ×3: 2d10 (+4d10). ×4: 3d10 (+6d10). This burst does not harm you or any creature other than the target unless you are undead. This is a continuous effect and requires no activation. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A dozens-sun adorned weapon augmentation crystal.
